# thoth_tenant_settings (Resource)

Manages tenant-wide Thoth governance settings.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `compliance_profile` (String) Compliance profile (soc2, healthcare, financial, public_sector, privacy, ai_governance).
- `extra_settings_json` (String) Additional JSON object merged into the outgoing settings payload for forward compatibility.
- `model_router_allowed_models` (List of String) Allowed model names allowlist.
- `model_router_allowed_providers` (List of String) Allowed model providers allowlist.
- `model_router_default_model` (String) Default model name.
- `model_router_default_provider` (String) Default model provider.
- `model_router_enabled` (Boolean) Enable model routing policy controls.
- `model_router_failover_providers` (List of String) Failover provider order.
- `pam_callback_secret` (String, Sensitive) Shared secret for PAM callback validation.
- `pam_enabled` (Boolean) Enable PAM step-up callback integration.
- `pam_provider` (String) PAM provider slug.
- `pam_request_auth_token` (String, Sensitive) Outbound PAM auth token.
- `pam_request_secret` (String, Sensitive) Outbound PAM request secret.
- `pam_request_timeout_seconds` (Number) Outbound PAM request timeout in seconds.
- `pam_request_url` (String) Outbound PAM request URL.
- `secret_broker_allowed_hosts` (List of String) Allowed host patterns for secret broker.
- `secret_broker_auth_bindings_json` (String) JSON array of auth binding objects (host_pattern, header, secret_ref, prefix).
- `secret_broker_enabled` (Boolean) Enable secret broker policy enforcement.
- `secret_broker_fail_on_missing_secret` (Boolean) Fail governed calls when referenced secret is unavailable.
- `secret_broker_provider` (String) Secret broker provider slug.
- `secret_broker_strict_endpoint_mode` (Boolean) Require endpoint registration for secret resolution.
- `shadow_critical` (String) Default action for critical risk events.
- `shadow_high` (String) Default action for high risk events.
- `shadow_low` (String) Default action for low risk events.
- `shadow_medium` (String) Default action for medium risk events.
- `siem_provider` (String) SIEM provider slug.
- `siem_webhook_enabled` (Boolean) Enable SIEM webhook delivery.
- `siem_webhook_provider` (String) SIEM webhook provider slug.
- `siem_webhook_secret` (String, Sensitive) SIEM webhook signing secret.
- `siem_webhook_url` (String) SIEM webhook URL.
- `test_webhook_on_apply` (Boolean) Run webhook test endpoint after applying settings.
- `tool_risk_overrides` (Map of String) Tool-specific risk tier overrides.
- `webhook_enabled` (Boolean) Enable outbound webhook delivery.
- `webhook_secret` (String, Sensitive) Webhook signing secret.
- `webhook_url` (String) Outbound webhook URL.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier (tenant ID).
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID resolved from provider configuration.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp returned by GovAPI.
